issues.sample: The problem first arose in June 2023 with a different car, 2022 CT4V VIN [XXX] .  I was driving and suddenly, all the dashboard lights went on and the brakes stopped working.  There was no pressure on the pedal.  I was able to roll to a stop without incident.  I turned the car of

The vehicle shut off while driving on the feeder of the highway. Vehicle was no longer responsive and had to be towed to Central Cadillac of Houston; where later it was determined that the vehicle needed a new engine. The Vehicle is a 2023 with less than 5,000 miles on it. Curren

narrative.headline: What 2023 Cadillac Ct4 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Steering (33% of reports).
